# Plan Topic - Implementation Workflow

This is a sample plan topic for testing the topic scanner.

## Planning Workflow

1. Create PRD (01-prd.md)
2. Write spec (02-spec.md)
3. Draft implementation plan (03-implementation-plan.md)
4. Track progress (04-progress.md)

## Best Practices

- Keep plans focused and achievable
- Update progress regularly
- Document decisions in knowledge base
